authorOptions.desc: How many GCDs to pool when using Mind Flay
authorOptions.name: Mind Flay GCDs to Pool

controlledChildren: From Darkness Comes Light - Active - Shadow

check.value:
function()
    if aura_env.state and aura_env.state.stacks then
        if aura_env.state.stacks == 4 then
            return true
        else
            return false
        end
        
    end
    
end

trigger.custom:
function (states, event, ...)
    if event == "UNIT_SPELLCAST_SUCCEEDED" then
        local spellId = select(3, ...)
        
        -- casting Devouring Plague
        if spellId == 335467 then 
            if states[""] then
                local state = states[""]
                if state.stacks < 4 then
                    state.stacks = state.stacks + 1
                end 
                
                state.changed = true
                return true
            else
                states[""] = {
                    show = true,
                    changed = true,
                    stacks = 1,
                    value = 1,
                    total = 1,
                    progressType = "static"
                }
                return true
            end
        end
    elseif event == "COMBAT_LOG_EVENT_UNFILTERED" then
        local _,subEvent,_,_,_,_,_,destGUID,_,_,_,spellID,_,_,_,_ = ...
        if (spellID == 453113 or spellID == 453112) and UnitGUID("player") == destGUID then
            states[""] = {
                show = false,
                changed = true,
                stacks = 0,
                value = 1,
                total = 1,
                progressType = "static"
            }
        end
    end
end

children.desc: Displays a . on the Devouring Plague icon in Publik's Shadow Priest Grid when your next cast of Devouring Plague will grant a Surge of Insanity buff.

children.id: From Darkness Comes Light - Active - Shadow

main.alphaFunc:
function(progress, start, delta)
    if aura_env.state and aura_env.state.duration then
        local display_time = 4.8 -- change this as needed
        local o = aura_env.region.orientation
        local point, xOff, yOff, pix
        if o == "HORIZONTAL" then 
            point = "LEFT" 
            pix = aura_env.region.bar:GetWidth() / aura_env.state.duration
            xOff = pix * display_time
            yOff = 0
        elseif o == "HORIZONTAL_INVERSE" then 
            point = "RIGHT" 
            pix = aura_env.region.bar:GetWidth() / aura_env.state.duration
            xOff = 0 - (pix * display_time)
            yOff = 0
        elseif o == "VERTICAL" then 
            point = "TOP"
            pix = aura_env.region.bar:GetHeight() / aura_env.state.duration
            xOff = 0
            yOff = 0 - (pix * display_time)
        elseif o == "VERTICAL_INVERSE" then 
            point = "BOTTOM" 
            pix = aura_env.region.bar:GetHeight() / aura_env.state.duration
            xOff = 0
            yOff = pix * display_time
        end
        aura_env.region.bar.spark:ClearAllPoints()
        aura_env.region.bar.spark:SetPoint("CENTER", aura_env.region.bar, point, xOff, yOff)
    end
    return start 
end

trigger.events: UNIT_SPELLCAST_START:player, UNIT_SPELLCAST_STOP:player, UNIT_SPELLCAST_SUCCESS:player, UNIT_DISPLAYPOWER:player, UNIT_POWER_FREQUENT:player, UNIT_POWER_UPDATE:player

children.customGrow:
function(newPositions, activeRegions)
    -- 3 row config: limit=6, rows=3, spacing=4, total=17, rowPadding=3
    -- 4 row config: limit=6, rows=4, spacing=4, total=22, rowPadding=3
    local limit = 6 -- limit of icons per row (default: 6)
    local rows = 3 -- total rows (default: 3)
    local spacing = 4 -- spacing between icons (default: 4)
    local total = 17 -- how many icons in total you'd like (use #activeRegions for all) (default: 17)
    local rowPadding = 3 -- padding between rows (default: 3)
    ----------------------
    local check = true
    local xCount = 0
    local yCount = 0
    local tCount = 0
    
    local xOffset = 0;
    local yOffset = 0;
    local missingIcons = 0;
    local missingPadding = 0;
    local rowCount = 1;
    local reduced = 0;
    
    local totalActiveIcons = 0
    for _ in pairs(activeRegions) do totalActiveIcons = totalActiveIcons + 1 end
    
    if totalActiveIcons > 22 then
        rowCount = 5
    elseif totalActiveIcons > 17 then
        rowCount = 4
    elseif totalActiveIcons > 11 then
        rowCount = 3
    elseif totalActiveIcons > 5 then
        rowCount = 2
    end
    
    if #activeRegions < total then
        missingIcons = total - #activeRegions; 
    end
    
    for i, regionData in ipairs(activeRegions) do
        -- first row has 5 and smaller spacing
        if yCount == 0 then
            limit = 5;
            spacing = 2.5;
        elseif yCount > 0 and yCount < 3 then
            limit = 6;
            spacing = 4;
        else
            limit = 5;
            spacing = 2.5;
        end
        
        -- check if missingIcons has a whole row in it        
        if (reduced == 0) and (missingIcons > limit) then
            missingIcons = missingIcons - limit;
            -- Only ever do this once
            reduced = 1
            
            if missingIcons == 1 then
                missingIcons = 0;
            end
        end
        
        local region = regionData.region
        
        local regionsLeft = total - tCount
        local rowTotal = 1
        
        if total <= limit then
            rowTotal = total
        elseif (regionsLeft < limit and xCount < 1) or not check then
            check = false
            rowTotal = regionsLeft
        elseif yCount >= rows-1 then
            rowTotal = regionsLeft
        elseif total > limit then
            rowTotal = limit
        end
        
        -- Apply a smaller size to the icons in the bottom row and larger to the top row
        -- NOTE: this just overwrites the actual aura so we need to set the others back to 40
        if yCount == 0 then
            activeRegions[i].region:SetRegionHeight(50);
            activeRegions[i].region:SetRegionWidth(50);
        elseif yCount > 1 then 
            activeRegions[i].region:SetRegionHeight(35);
            activeRegions[i].region:SetRegionWidth(35);
            -- If you have less icons than the total adjust their xOffset so they are centered
            if (yCount == rowCount-1) then
                missingPadding = missingIcons * 19.5;
            end
        else 
            activeRegions[i].region:SetRegionHeight(40);
            activeRegions[i].region:SetRegionWidth(40);
            if (yCount == rowCount-1) then
                missingPadding = missingIcons * 12;
            else
                missingPadding = 0;
            end
        end
        
        xOffset = 0 - (region.width + spacing) / 2 * (rowTotal-1) + (xCount * (region.width + spacing)) + missingPadding;
        yOffset = 0 - (region.height + spacing + rowPadding) * yCount -- change '-' to '+' after 0 to grow up instead of down
        
        -- Apply more padding between the 1st and 2nd rows to account for the resource bar
        if yCount > 0 then
            yOffset = yOffset - 26;
        end
        
        -- Apply an extra offset to everything after row 1
        if yCount > 1 then
            yOffset = yOffset - 4;
        end
        
        xCount = xCount + 1
        
        if yCount < rows-1 and check then
            tCount = tCount + 1
            if xCount >= limit then
                xCount = 0
                yCount = yCount + 1
            end
        end
        
        
        -- only display auras up to the total
        if i > total then
            break;
        end
        
        newPositions[i] = {xOffset, yOffset}
    end
end
children.customSort:
function(a, b)
    -- sort by name ascending
    return a.dataIndex <= b.dataIndex
end

controlledChildren: Surge of Insanity - Next Cast Display

check.value:
function()
    if aura_env.state and aura_env.state.value then
        if aura_env.state.value == 1 then
            return true
        else
            return false
        end
        
    end
    
end

trigger.custom:
function (states, event, ...)
    if event == "STATUS" then
        states[""] = {
            show = true,
            changed = true,
            value = aura_env.saved.value or 2,
            total = 2,
            progressType = "static",
            icon = 425954,
        }
        
        return true
    elseif event == "PLAYER_ENTERING_WORLD" then
        local isLogin, isReload = ...
        if isLogin then
            aura_env.saved.value = 2
        end
    elseif event == "PLAYER_DEAD" then
        local state = states[""]
        state.changed = state.value ~= 2
        state.value = 2
        aura_env.saved.value = 2
        
        return state.changed
    elseif event == "UNIT_SPELLCAST_SUCCEEDED" then
        local spellId = select(3, ...)
        
        -- casting Devouring Plague
        if spellId == 335467 then
            aura_env.last_dp = GetTime()
            local state = states[""]
            
            if state.value > 1 then
                state.value = state.value - 1
                aura_env.saved.value = state.value
            else
                state.value = 2
                aura_env.saved.value = 2
            end 
            state.changed = true
            
            return true
        end
    elseif event == "COMBAT_LOG_EVENT_UNFILTERED" then
        local _,subEvent,_,_,_,_,_,destGUID,_,_,_,spellID,_,_,_,_ = ...
        if (spellID == 391401 or spellID == 407468) and UnitGUID("player") == destGUID and aura_env.last_dp then
            local surgeTime = GetTime()
            -- Check if you got surge recently compared to last DP cast
            -- if so reset state
            if surgeTime - aura_env.last_dp < 50 then
                --print("reset " .. aura_env.last_dp)
                local state = states[""]
                state.changed = true
                state.value = 1
                aura_env.saved.value = 1
                return true
            end
        end
    end
end
